center.name: 亚纳河
center.summary: 亚纳河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白鹤，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The western area in the river basins of the Ob, Konda and Sossva and to the east a much larger population in Yakutia between the Yana and the Alazeya rivers. Like most cranes, the Siberian crane inhabits shallow marshlands and wetlands and will often forage in deeper water than other cranes
